events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in black is refueling the car in the gas station, and a woman in rice clothes comes from the room on the left.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 4.0s, a man in black is refueling the car in the gas station, and a woman in rice clothes comes from the room on the left.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; After the man in black put the oil gun back into the machine, the woman in rice walked to the car on the right side of the man in black.
events.event_text: From 4.0s to 13.3s, after the man in black put the oil gun back into the machine, the woman in rice walked to the car on the right side of the man in black.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The man in black walked into the room on the left, and the woman in rice drove a car and left the gas station.
events.event_text: From 13.3s to 36.1s, the man in black walked into the room on the left, and the woman in rice drove a car and left the gas station.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; Several vehicles passed by the road next to the gas station. The man in black walked out of the room and then returned to the car.
events.event_text: From 36.1s to 57.3s, several vehicles passed by the road next to the gas station. The man in black walked out of the room and then returned to the car.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; A car on the right is parked next to the refueling machine.
events.event_text: From 57.3s to 60.5s, a car on the right is parked next to the refueling machine.
